title: Warm Nutty Mexican Cheese Curds Tinga
description: A nutty and tender lacto-vegetarian dish featuring cheese curds in a Yucatecan style tinga, wrapped in a ti leaf.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium heat.
In a blender or food processor, blend the pumpkin seeds into a fine crumb.
In a large bowl, combine the cheese curds, toasted pumpkin seed crumb, diced onion, and minced garlic.
Add the chipotle peppers and their adobo sauce to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Brush the ti leaves with vegetable oil on both sides.
Place a quarter of the cheese curd mixture onto the center of each ti leaf.
Fold the ti leaves over the filling to form a tight packet.
Grill the packets for 2-3 minutes on each side, until the cheese is melted and the ti leaves are slightly charred.
Serve the warm nutty Mexican cheese curds tinga immediately.
